nodes.body:
ok @ddl-ebrown  think here's where dev-v2 will get the vals.

though im not sure what to do about the `com.cerebro.domino.flows.enabled` one. we don't want to just add a default "enabled=true" here, need to ref the deployment config and not sure how to do that correctly here. at the very least, for now it could just be a "known issue" that on dev-v2 if you want to use flows you have to do `bazel run //nucleus -- --jvm_flag=-Dcom.cerebro.domino.flows.enabled=true`

cc @ddl-jbrown
Yeah, basically I wanted to make sure when we're NOT doing an install using k8s / helm charts that we still get the right default values during development.
i'll add this to the dev-v2 and flows runbooks
